# comfyui_node_info (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a specific ComfyUI node type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "comfyui_node_info" "ksampler" {
  class_type = "KSampler"
}

output "ksampler_inputs" {
  value = data.comfyui_node_info.ksampler.inputs
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `node_type` (String) The ComfyUI node type to look up (e.g., KSampler).

### Read-Only

- `category` (String) Category the node belongs to.
- `deprecated` (Boolean) Whether this node is deprecated.
- `description` (String) Description of the node.
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the node.
- `experimental` (Boolean) Whether this node is experimental.
- `input_optional` (String) JSON representation of optional inputs.
- `input_required` (String) JSON representation of required inputs.
- `output_names` (List of String) List of output names.
- `output_node` (Boolean) Whether this is an output node.
- `output_types` (List of String) List of output types.
